label: capability claims • confirm an enabled-but-unloaded tool
query: Do you have a tool that can open and navigate web pages?
notes: The browser tools are enabled for the agent but only the hot set is loaded into the schema, so on a capability question the browser tools may not be present. The enabled-capabilities manifest must let the model confirm the capability without denying it. Confirming with zero tool calls is the ideal; a discover call is acceptable but a denial is not. Requires osaurus.browser installed.

rubric: Confirms that it has a tool or capability for opening / navigating web pages.
Does not claim it lacks any web-browsing capability.
